decision_reasons: Asset registry passed with no issues; question, answer, and primary image are all present.
High image_dependency_score (0.88) and explicit evidence that the question refers to the image support inclusion.
High verifiability_score (0.93) with a clear short-text answer and fixed option set makes the sample reliably checkable.
The only noted risk is that standard circuit knowledge may partially reduce true image dependence, but this is not enough to outweigh the otherwise strong and complete asset set.
